checks.describe: local registry:2 responds on the v2 API
pack a synthetic modelkit, push to local registry, unpack on a clean dir — tag survives the round trip
checks.run:
set -e; RP="${M4_REGISTRY_PORT:-5001}"; T=$(mktemp -d); trap 'rm -rf "$T"' EXIT; mkdir -p "$T/src/model"; echo 'dummy-weights' > "$T/src/model/weights.bin"; printf 'SYSTEM_PROMPT=test\n' > "$T/src/prompts.txt"; cat > "$T/src/Kitfile" <<'EOF'
manifestVersion: "1.0.0"
package: {name: checks-smoke-model, version: "1.0.0", authors: ["checks"]}
model: {name: checks-smoke-model, path: ./model/weights.bin}
code:  [{path: ./prompts.txt, description: "config"}]
EOF
kit pack "$T/src" -t localhost:${RP}/checks-smoke-model:1.0.0; kit push --plain-http localhost:${RP}/checks-smoke-model:1.0.0; kit remove localhost:${RP}/checks-smoke-model:1.0.0; kit unpack --plain-http localhost:${RP}/checks-smoke-model:1.0.0 -d "$T/out"; kit list --plain-http localhost:${RP}/checks-smoke-model
